mechanics.arena_response_limit: During an Arena attempt, only 1 Support and 1 Sabotage may resolve.

crowd_disfavor.trigger: Gain when you fail an Arena Challenge.

cards.name: Charity
cards.effect_text: +1 Coin
cards.rules_notes: Each player starts with 7 Charity cards in their deck.

cards.name: Spy
cards.effect_text: When played, choose a faction [Legion, Ludus, Senate], this becomes that faction until discarded.
cards.rules_notes: Each player starts with 3 Spy cards in their deck.

cards.name: Fresh Recruit
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins

cards.name: Vexillary
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. When gained, you may destroy up to 2 cards from your hand and/or discard.

cards.name: Auxiliary
cards.effect_text: +1 Coin OR destroy to Draw 1 card

cards.name: Scout
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins. Destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Pilum Thrower
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may destroy a card from your hand or discard.

cards.name: Cohorts
cards.effect_text: Draw 2 Cards OR Sabotage: Draw 2 Cards and give -2 Valor.

cards.name: War Banner
cards.effect_text: Destroy a card from your hand and gain +3 Coins.

cards.name: Shield Wall
cards.effect_text: +1 Coin. Draw 3 cards, then discard 1 card from your hand.

cards.name: Supply Wagon
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Put a card from your discard pile into your hand.

cards.name: Centurion
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. This card is worth 1 VP for each Legion card in your deck.

cards.name: Drills
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. If you played a Ludus and Senate card this turn, Draw 1 Card.

cards.name: Formation
cards.effect_text: Gain a Faction card from the Market costing 3 or less.

cards.name: Engineer
cards.effect_text: Other players must discard 2 cards.

cards.name: Armory
cards.effect_text: Draw 2 cards

cards.name: Medicus
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins. Sabotage: If challenge Fails, a challenger is destroyed.

cards.name: Prefect
cards.effect_text: +1 Coin. Gain the faction bonus of Ludus, Senate, or Legion this turn.

cards.name: Praetorian
cards.effect_text: You may add a 4th participant in the Arena Challenge this turn.

cards.name: Tribune
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins. Draw 1 card.

cards.name: Encampment
cards.effect_text: Draw 1 card. Then gain a Faction card costing 5 or less from the Market for free.

cards.name: Veteran
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. While in play, sabotage cards negative value is reduced by 1.

cards.name: Commander
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Factions cost 1 less this turn.

cards.name: Captain
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Draw and play the top card of the Market deck. Destroy it at end of turn.

cards.name: Unstoppable Legion
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. You may destroy a card from your hand or discard. If you do, gain a card costing up to 1 more than the destroyed card.

cards.name: Siege Master
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Destroy any card from any discard pile.

cards.name: Cavalry
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Put a Legion card from your discard pile on top of your deck.

cards.name: Forced March
cards.effect_text: Gain a card from the Market costing 4 or less. Then destroy a card in the Market and replace it.

cards.name: Senator
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. The next card you gain this turn goes into your hand.

cards.name: Clerk
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins.

cards.name: Senate Intel
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins. Look at the top 2 cards of any deck. Keep 1 on top and place 1 on bottom.

cards.name: Tribune
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Look at the top 3 cards of any deck. Keep 1 on top, place the other 2 on the bottom.

cards.name: Fair Trade
cards.effect_text: Gain an Item card from the Market costing 4 or less.

cards.name: Alliance
cards.effect_text: Copy the effect of another card in play costing 5 or less.

cards.name: Bribery
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Pick an opponent, reveal a random card from their hand and play it. Destroy it at end of turn.

cards.name: Decree
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins OR when Arena is defeated this round, the victor gains Gratia equal to the Victory Points of the Arena Challenge. Arena Challenge is discarded. This may be played as a Sabotage or Support, though it counts as neither.

cards.name: Praetor
cards.effect_text: While in play, you do not need to participate in the Arena.

cards.name: Proclamation
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins OR +3 Coins if you already played a Senate card this turn.

cards.name: Patron
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may place a destroyed card onto the Market deck.

cards.name: Sententia
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Flip up to 2 cards in the Market face down until your next turn.

cards.name: Principate
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. If you played a Legion and Ludus card this turn, gain +2 Coins.

cards.name: Orator
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins OR Sabotage -3 Valor.

cards.name: Envoy
cards.effect_text: +1 Coin OR destroy for +2 Coins

cards.name: Statesman
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may put a Senate card from your discard pile on top of your deck.

cards.name: Noblewoman
cards.effect_text: Gain 2 Gratia from Arena Challenge victory this turn.

cards.name: Advisor
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins OR gain an Item card costing 4 or less from the Gallery.

cards.name: Mentorship
cards.victory_formula: 1 VP per Senate card in deck
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. This card is worth 1 VP for each Senate card in your deck.

cards.name: Treasury Official
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins.

cards.name: Consul
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Then gain an Item card costing 5 or less from the Market for free.

cards.name: Tax Collector
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Destroy a card in hand, gain Coin equal to it's cost.

cards.name: Manipulator
cards.effect_text: All players discard their hands and redraw the same number of Cards -1. You draw 2 additional cards.

cards.name: High Consul
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Look at an opponent's hand and force them to discard 1 card.

cards.name: Voice of Rome
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Items cost 2 less this turn.

cards.name: Damnatio
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Destroy an Epic card in the Gallery.

cards.name: Secutor
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may place a Ludus card from your discard pile on top of your deck.

cards.name: Cestus
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Destroy a card in the Gallery, replace it immediately.

cards.name: Retiarius
cards.effect_text: +1 Coin. You may destroy a card from your hand. If you do, draw 1 card and gain a Favor.

cards.name: Hoplomachus
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins OR Support +3 Valor

cards.name: Gladiatrix
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Destroy up to 3 cards in the Gallery and replace them.

cards.name: Ex-Soldier
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. If you played a Senate and Legion card this turn, gain a Favor.

cards.name: Savage
cards.effect_text: +1 Coin OR destroy for a Favor

cards.name: Dimachaerus
cards.effect_text: Gain a Favor. Gain +1 Valor per challenger in the Arena.

cards.name: Murmillo
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Sabotage: -4 Valor. Support: +3 Support.

cards.name: Armorer
cards.effect_text: Gain a card from Destroyed Pile costing 4 or less.

cards.name: Brute
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins. Destroy a card in the Market, replace it at end of your turn.

cards.name: Bestiarii
cards.effect_text: +1 Coins. Gain a Favor. Gain +2 Valor in Beast Arena Challenges.

cards.name: Praeco
cards.effect_text: Draw 3 Favors, select 1 to gain, discard the other 2.

cards.name: Medicus
cards.effect_text: Gain a Favor. Then gain a card from the Destroyed Pile costing 3 or less..

cards.name: Doctore
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins OR if this is the first card you played this turn, discard your hand and draw 5 cards.

cards.name: Pompa
cards.effect_text: Opponents only gain 1 coin from each card they play on their next round.
cards.rules_notes: This effect is cumulative with other effects that reduce opponent coins.

cards.name: Spectators
cards.victory_formula: 1 VP per Ludus card in deck
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. This card is worth 1 VP for each Ludus card in your deck.

cards.name: Victory
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. Epics cost 1 less this turn.

cards.name: Veteran
cards.effect_text: Copy the effect of any Market card costing 6 or less.

cards.name: Rudiarii
cards.effect_text: During an Arena attempt, you may play this to cancel 1 Sabotage. This may be played after the Sabotage attempt.

cards.name: Champion
cards.effect_text: While in play, you cannot be sabotaged in Arena challenges.

cards.name: Executioner
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins. Reveal the top card of each player's deck. For each revealed card, destroy it or return it.

cards.name: Lanista
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. You may purchase a card from the destroyed pile this turn.

cards.name: Ludus Magnus
cards.effect_text: Gain a card costing 5 or less from the Market for free.

cards.name: Legendary
cards.effect_text: Pick a Favor that has been discarded and play it again. Remove it from the game after.

cards.name: Novicii
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins

cards.name: Rome
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins OR +2 Coins per Clerk, Fresh Recruit, or Novice in play.

cards.name: The Forum
cards.effect_text: +5 Coin.

cards.name: Julius Caesar
cards.effect_text: Select an Opponent, Gain the Lowest cost card in their hand (they lose the card).

cards.name: The Colosseum
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. If you defeat Arena this turn, gain +2 Victory Points.

cards.name: Crixus
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. You may Destroy up to 2 cards from your hand and/or discard pile.

cards.name: The Emperor
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins. When gained, put on top of deck.

cards.name: Flamma
cards.effect_text: Draw 2 Cards. You may Destroy up to 2 Disfavor in Hand and/or Discard. For each destroyed, draw a card.

cards.name: Germanicus
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Put a non-Epic card from your discard into your hand.

cards.name: Marcus Crassus
cards.effect_text: Draw 3 Cards

cards.name: Preparation
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins. Gain a Faction Bonus of your choice

cards.name: Spartacus
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins. Destroy a card in the Market and gain +5 Coins.

cards.name: Mark Antony
cards.effect_text: +2 Coins. Gain a card of cost 6 or less.

cards.name: Scipio Africanus
cards.effect_text: +3 Coin. You may destroy a card in hand and then Draw a Card.

cards.name: Pompey the Great
cards.effect_text: +3 Coins, Gain a card from the Market costing 6 or less.

cards.name: The Republic
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins, the next card gained goes to your hand.

cards.name: Vestal Priestess
cards.effect_text: Reveal 5 Favors, select 2 to gain, discard the remaining 3

cards.name: Oenomaus
cards.effect_text: Copy the effects of a Card in the Market or in the Epic Tier

cards.name: Constantine
cards.effect_text: +4 Coins. Copy the effect of any non-Epic card in play.
